name: Fetid Jofnhild
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears a patched vest and coarse linens - the worn clothing of someone living in poverty.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: destitute, informative, helpful, afflicted
Role: Fetid Jofnhild is a beggar living on the streets of Bruma. He begs for food and money at various locations around the city and, like other beggars throughout Cyrodiil, can provide information to those seeking to join the Thieves Guild. For a small fee, he can also provide information about people in Bruma.
Home Location Information: Fetid Jofnhild sleeps in a bedroll west of Bruma's north gate.
Daily Routine: Jofnhild wakes at 6am and walks to the east gate to beg for food and money. At 10am, he moves to the alley behind the Mages Guild and Fighters Guild, where he begs for four hours. At 2pm, he returns to his bedroll and strolls around the area until 6pm. At 6pm, he eats a two-hour dinner if there's food in the sack near his bedroll - his only meal of the day. After dinner, he continues wandering in the general area until his bedtime at 10pm.
His Condition: Fetid Jofnhild carries the disease rattles, which can spread to others through physical contact. His name and condition reflect his impoverished state.
Personality - The Struggling Informant: Fetid Jofnhild lives a hardscrabble existence, begging for sustenance and sleeping outdoors. Despite his circumstances, he is willing to share information for a small fee and can be helpful to those in need.
author: Bethesda
